name: realestate-platform
description: Production-ready real estate platform for Borg El Arab, Egypt

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,property,booking,chat,media,notif -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/property-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/booking-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/chat-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/media-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,property,booking,chat,media,notif -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/property-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/booking-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/chat-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/media-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,property,booking,chat,media,notif,dashboard -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/property-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/booking-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/chat-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/media-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/admin-dashboard"
scripts.killall: pkill -f 'tsx watch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'concurrently' 2>/dev/null; for p in 3001 3002 3003 3004 3005 3006; do fuser -k ${p}/tcp 2>/dev/null; done; echo 'All services killed'
